enemy.name: Pop Quiz
enemy.special: onPlayerChargeCorrect: stun enemy next turn. onPlayerNoCharge: gains +1 permanent enrage bonus damage.

hand.name: Quicken
hand.description: Gain +1 AP this turn. Charge bonus: also draw 1 card.

hand.name: Focus
hand.description: Next card costs 1 less AP. Charge bonus: next TWO cards cost 1 less AP.

hand.name: Recycle
hand.description: Draw 3 cards. Charge bonus: also recover 1 card from discard.

relics.name: Swift Boots
relics.description: Draw 6 cards per turn instead of 5.

notes: Pop Quiz has dual reactive hooks. Charging correctly stuns it (strong incentive to Charge). NOT charging gives it permanent damage buffs. But Quicken is free and costs 0 AP. Is charging the Quicken worth it just to stun Pop Quiz? The stun benefit is powerful but costs 1 AP surcharge per charge. Deep AP optimization puzzle.
